identity: Dashing human male swashbuckler, jet-black wavy hair framing a handsome face with a thin moustache and goatee, mischievous dark eyes, olive skin, slim agile build.
outfit: Crimson-red doublet with gold trim over a white puffy-sleeved shirt, wide black belt with a gold buckle, dark trousers tucked into tall black cuffed boots. A black tricorn hat with a long red feather. Dark cape trailing from the shoulders.
weapons: A slender silver-hilted rapier held in the right hand, tip raised. A curved dagger at the left hip.
attackStyle: East-facing. Rapier lunged forward in a fencing thrust, right leg extended, left arm held high behind for balance. Cape flares.
spellStyle: East-facing. Rapier held aloft, left hand raised with a single spinning gold coin in the fingertips (trick-magic).
blockStyle: East-facing. Rapier held vertically in front, guarding stance, tricorn hat tilted down, cape pulled across.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen on his back, rapier fallen beside him, tricorn hat off and rolled nearby. Cape splayed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), confident bowing idle. Rapier in right hand tip-down, left hand sweeping tricorn hat.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Moustache + goatee, tricorn hat with red feather, crimson doublet.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Dashing human male swashbuckler, jet-black wavy hair framing a handsome face with a thin moustache and goatee, mischievous dark eyes, olive skin, slim agile build.

OUTFIT: Crimson-red doublet with gold trim over a white puffy-sleeved shirt, wide black belt with a gold buckle, dark trousers tucked into tall black cuffed boots. A black tricorn hat with a long red feather. Dark cape trailing from the shoulders.

WEAPONS: A slender silver-hilted rapier held in the right hand, tip raised. A curved dagger at the left hip.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Dashing human male swashbuckler, jet-black wavy hair framing a handsome face with a thin moustache and goatee, mischievous dark eyes, olive skin, slim agile build.

OUTFIT: Crimson-red doublet with gold trim over a white puffy-sleeved shirt, wide black belt with a gold buckle, dark trousers tucked into tall black cuffed boots. A black tricorn hat with a long red feather. Dark cape trailing from the shoulders.

WEAPONS: A slender silver-hilted rapier held in the right hand, tip raised. A curved dagger at the left hip.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Moustache + goatee, tricorn hat with red feather, crimson doublet.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
